events.title: World AIDS Day
events.summary: An international day dedicated to raising awareness of the AIDS pandemic caused by the spread of HIV infection and mourning those who have died of the disease.

events.title: Giving Tuesday
events.summary: A global generosity movement unleashing the power of people and organisations to transform their communities and the world, following the consumerism of Black Friday.

events.title: Eat a Red Apple Day
events.summary: A light-hearted day promoting healthy eating and celebrating the variety of red apples available, often used by schools to discuss nutrition.
